summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Affiliate Pro EZ AD Creator app. All backend APIs (11/11 tests) passed. Frontend UI testing covered all major pages with all core functionality working. Minor CSS layout issues found on Analytics and Templates pages.

issues: Stats cards (Views, Likes, Shares, Engagement) appear to stretch full-width instead of being in a responsive grid layout
Category filter chips appear squished together without proper spacing between them
Template cards display in single column list rather than a responsive grid layout

action_items: Fix Analytics page stats cards to display in a proper grid (2x2 or 4-column on desktop)
Fix Templates page category chips to have proper gap/spacing between each chip
Fix Templates page template cards to display in responsive grid layout

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly, all interactive elements work

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test data in DB (3 videos: 1 completed, 1 processing, 1 failed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. The Sora 2 API integration is REAL (not mocked). Existing videos in DB include completed, processing, and failed statuses. Templates page has 8 default templates. The navbar correctly hides on home page and shows on all other pages.

frontend_ui_tests: Home page - branding, feature cards, CTA buttons, navbar hidden
Generator page - navbar visible, form elements, Random Idea button, Use This Style button
Library page - video cards with status badges (completed/processing/failed)
Templates page - category filter chips, template cards, Use Template navigation
Gallery page - empty state with Create & Share CTA
Analytics page - overview stats cards (Views, Likes, Shares, Engagement)
Batch Generator page - add/remove video entries
Template Creator page - form with all required fields
